creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was looking for a way to start Ghidra with a non-default JDK and found out that it is possible by overriding some defaults in the /usr/local/share/ghidra/support/launch.properties file.

Would it be possible to install this file as /usr/local/share/ghidra/support/launch.properties.sample and mark it with @sample in pkg-plist so that user modification are not overwritten by an package update?

More on the @sample keyword: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#plist-keywords-sample
